response.step_by_step_log:
1. Watched the video and identified the primary musical content as S/mileage covers by VTubers. 
2. Identified "Toki wo Koe Sora wo Koe" as the song being performed.
3. Used search to find lyrics and confirmed the original artist/composer is Morning Musume '14/Tsunku. 
4. Detected scene changes based on visual transitions (performance vs. introductions).
5. Documented scene start/end times and content. 
6. Applied search rules: used original artist "Morning Musume" and song title "Toki wo Koe Sora wo Koe" for lookup. 
7. Formatted lyrics and response according to JSON syntax rules.
response.global_summary: This video features a group of VTubers performing a dance to various songs by the Japanese idol group S/mileage. The video includes scenes of the performers dancing, talking, and introducing the songs, along with on-screen text highlighting the names of the VTubers and the group name "S/mileage".

scenes.description: Multiple VTubers dance in a studio setting. On-screen text includes #KiaraBday2026. The scene includes spoken dialogue and music.
scenes.song_title: Toki wo Koe Sora wo Koe
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
私 はまだ ね 未完成
遠い 過去 から 君 を 待つ
この世 で 出会える と 信じ
君 を 待つ
時空 を 超え 宇宙 を 超え
結ば れる 頃 には
この 地球 は
きれいに なる かな
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: (I'm still not perfect, I've been waiting for you since long ago. I wait for you, having faith we'll meet in this world...Across time and space, we've been bound since that time to make this planet a beautiful place.)

scenes.description: The VTubers are introduced with their names on screen, associated with the name "S/mileage".
The VTubers continue their performance with more dancing and singing.
